_comment: Session-scoped guard. When blockArticleWrites=true, src/lib/db/articles.ts::updateArticle will throw for any row whose id is NOT in the allowedIds list. Set allowedIds:[] to reject every write. This file is checked in; remove or set blockArticleWrites=false when you want normal writes to resume.
